title: NIT Kurukshetra Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant and Field Investigator Posts
organization: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra (NIT Kurukshetra)
short_info: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra (NIT Kurukshetra) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra has released the official notification for 3 Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking education jobs.

age_limit.age_details: As per Government of India norms
age_limit.details: As per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Science Discipline with a minimum 55% marks with NET/Ph.D/M.Tech for Research Assistant and Graduate in the Social Science Discipline with a minimum 55% marks for Field Investigator.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Post Graduate in Social Science Discipline with a minimum 55% marks with NET/Ph.D/M.Tech. Relevant research/industrial experience and technical knowledge (R & Python Language) will be preferred. Field Investigator: Graduate in the Social Science Discipline with a minimum 55% marks. Preference will be given to candidates with a four-year degree program (e.g., B.Tech). Relevant research/industrial experience and technical knowledge (R & Python Language) will be preferred.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirements Interview (online or offline mode)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Kurukshetra Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
